title: Optimizer: replace plateau stop with escalation and explicit blocked cycle outcomes

comments.text: Implementing plateau escalation (no plateau stop), explicit blocked cycle outcomes, and visibility updates in feedback_alignment_optimizer.yaml plus config tests.

comments.text: Implemented plateau escalation (no plateau stop), explicit blocked cycle outcomes, stage status-message updates via new plexus_set_stage_status tool, and updated optimizer config tests. Validation: pytest -q plexus/cli/procedure/test_feedback_alignment_optimizer_config.py (8 passed) plus python -m py_compile plexus/cli/procedure/mcp_transport.py.
